return(function(v,r,O,z,N,H,w,h,m,K,X,T,R,p,c,q,u,J,Z,l,L,d,Q,D)q,l,Z,J,Q,u,L,D,K,p,h,R,X,c,m,T,d=function(v,j)local r=J(j)local O=function(O,z,N,H,w,Z,d)return h(v,{O;z;N,H,w;Z,d},j,r)end return O O=function(O,z)return h(v,{O;z},j,r)end return O end,function(v)local j,h=148964+-148963,v[1009948+-1009947]while h do d[h],j=d[h]-(521552+-521551),j+(-759921-(-759922))if d[h]==1001872+-1001872 then d[h],Z[h]=nil,nil end h=v[j]end end,function(v,j)local r=J(j)local O=function(...)return h(v,{...},j,r)end return O end,{}return(T(-386881+6171912,{}))(r(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[j(994876+-973190)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
